sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-quantized conversion for a packed matrix, including Q15 scale handling, zero-point addition, unsigned quantized clamp, and zero-point centering.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer matrix multiplication over centered quantized A and B values, producing INT32 accumulators for each output element.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization of INT32 accumulators using Q15 scale_A and scale_B, packing each result as IEEE-754 FP32 bits.
